ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing item */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the item belongs to */,
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the style of the item */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the item */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the item */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_style_id FOREIGN KEY ("style_id") REFERENCES styles ("style_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hex code of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's preferred size */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the item */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to reorder when inventory falls below the reorder level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each material */,
  "material_name" TEXT /* Name of the material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the material */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item ordered */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the return is associated with */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item returned */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the item was returned */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the refund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_specs" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size specification */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clothing item */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement in inches */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "pant_length" REAL /* Pant length measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_specs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_specs_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL, 2XL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "size_group" TEXT /* Group of the size (e.g., adult, youth, children) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "styles" (
  "style_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each style */,
  "style_name" TEXT /* Name of the style */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the style */,
  "style_group" TEXT /* Group of the style (e.g., casual, formal, sporty) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("style_id")
)
